basic_details.job_title: IIM Udaipur Assistant / Associate Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur)Assistant, Associate Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iimu.ac.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Udaipur Assistant / Associate Manager – Placement and Corporate Relations Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate / Postgraduate degree in any discipline from a recognized university.
qualification.details: Graduate / Postgraduate degree in any discipline from a recognized university. Postgraduate degree in Marketing or allied disciplines (preferred). Minimum 3-5 years of cumulative client-facing experience in placement operations, corporate relations, recruiter outreach, etc., depending on the level (Assistant Manager - 3 years, Associate Manager - 5 years).

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant / Associate Manager – Placement and Corporate Relations (Two-Year MBA Programme)

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Udaipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Udaipur Assistant / Associate Manager position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Assistant / Associate Manager – Placement and Corporate Relations post at IIM Udaipur is 11-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualification requirements for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate or Postgraduate degree in any discipline. A Postgraduate degree in Marketing or allied disciplines is preferred, along with 3-5 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this position is 33 years.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Assistant / Associate Manager role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their applications, followed by a test and an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Assistant / Associate Manager – Placement and Corporate Relations position at IIM Udaipur is Contractual.

faq.question: Q7. In which city and state is this recruitment taking place?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Indian Institute of Management Udaipur, located in Udaipur, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply through offline mode?
faq.answer: No, candidates are required to apply online through the official IIM Udaipur website. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Assistant / Associate Manager – Placement and Corporate Relations (Two-Year MBA Programme).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" description.
